name: ono-project-inspector
description: Inspects an existing software repository and gradually builds a structured AI knowledge base for it (CLAUDE.md, AUDIT.md, and per-topic audit documents). Uses a breakdown → approve loop for audit topics and an on-demand documentation-sync maintenance tool, and tracks resumable orchestration state in .ono/state.json. The workflow is fully registry-driven: stage order, produced artifacts, and completion are declared in registry.json. Never modifies source code. First plugin in the Ono internal AI Marketplace.

extensibility.note: New inspector skills are added by (1) placing the skill under skills/<id>/ and listing it in this file's skills[] array, (2) adding one entry to skills/registry.json (with role/pairsWith/workflowRole as appropriate), and (3) optionally adding a hooks/after-<id>.md checkpoint file and a command. The orchestrating agent reads registry.json for stage order and relationships: a skill that fits an existing orchestration pattern (a linear stage, a breakdown-approve loop partner, or a maintenance tool) needs no agent change, but introducing a genuinely new pattern does update agents/project-inspector.md.
